architecture.summary: DeepStochLog extends stochastic definite clause grammars (a kind of stochastic logic program) with neural predicates (grammar rules). The system performs end-to-end training by integrating learned neural components into a symbolic inference engine. Information flows from input through neural rule evaluations embedded in the logic program's clause derivations, enabling joint neural-symbolic inference and learning.

biblio.title: DeepStochLog: Neural Stochastic Logic Programming
biblio.venue: Proceedings of the AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence

claims.statement: inference and learning in neural stochastic logic programming scale much better than for neural probabilistic logic programs
DeepStochLog achieves state-of-the-art results on challenging neural-symbolic learning tasks
